title: Domingoa nodosa

It belongs to the genus Domingoa, which is a group of plants commonly found in the tropical regions of South America. The species Domingoa nodosa is native to the Andes mountain range in Peru and Ecuador. Domingoa nodosa is a type of epiphytic plant that grows on other plants or trees. Within the Gesneriaceae family, Domingoa nodosa is part of the order Lamiales.
